args.CodeContent:
"# RARA Barefoot Static Clone Implementation Plan

This document outlines the plan to build a complete, pixel-perfect static HTML clone of **rarabarefoot.in** using plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The plan involves creating a static site with no frameworks (no React/Next/Tailwind). All pages will share a single `styles.css` and `main.js`. 
> Does this structure meet your expectations?

> [!NOTE]
> We will use placeholder CDN URLs from the prompt or publicly available `rarabarefoot.in` image links for the product images to ensure the scrub hover and gradient overlays work out of the box.

## Open Questions

1. Do you have specific product image CDN URLs from rarabarefoot.in you'd like me to use, or should I scrape/use placeholders that match the structure?
2. Would you like a basic cart logic in JavaScript (e.g., using `localStorage`) for the cart page, or just a visual mockup of the cart UI?

## Proposed Changes

We will create a new directory `C:\Users\Madhav Mehrotra\.gemini\antigravity\scratch\rara-clone\` containing all the necessary files.

### HTML Structure
Each page will have a consistent layout including the sticky navbar and footer.

#### [NEW] `index.html` (Home Page)
#### [NEW] `mens.html` (Men's Collection)
#### [NEW] `womens.html` (Women's Collection)
#### [NEW] `product.html` (Product Page Template)
#### [NEW] `why-barefoot.html`
#### [NEW] `barefoot-science.html`
#### [NEW] `community.html`
#### [NEW] `blogs.html`
#### [NEW] `help.html`
#### [NEW] `about.html`
#### [NEW] `returns.html`
#### [NEW] `cart.html`
#### [NEW] `collab.html`

### CSS & JS
#### [NEW] `styles.css`
Will contain:
- CSS variables for the color palette (`#ffffff`, `#000000`, `#2A5BA8`, `#ADCA12`, `#111111`, `#e0e0e0`).
- Font imports for Anton and Geist.
- Specific customisations from the prompt:
  - Enlarged logo typography and shrink-on-scroll `.scrolled` state.
  - `.product-card__media` gradient overlay (white to transpar
<truncated 1060 bytes>
